title: alchemilla coriacea subsp. straminea
intro: Alchemilla coriacea subsp. straminea, also known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a subspecies of the alpine lady's mantle plant, a perennial herb belonging to the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Alchemilla coriacea subsp. straminea include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
